Title: Matz, Friedrich (1843-1874)
Overview: German archaeologist and art historian of sarcophogial sculpture. Matz was the uncle of Friedrich Matz (1890-1974), the German authority on Mycenae.
Selected Bibliography: Duhn, Friedrich Karl von, edited. Antike Bildwerke in Rom: mit Ausschluss der grösseren Sammlungen. 3 vols. Leipzig: Breitkopf & Härtel, 1881-83; and Robert, Carl. Die Antiken Sarkophag-Reliefs. Berlin: G. Grote, 1880-1889
